antigravity_2_0_actions: Resolve target assets by source_zip and path_in_zip.
Import upgrade GLBs as optional child overlays or proxy meshes.
Import texture upgrades as material maps.
Create non-destructive prefab variants rather than overwriting originals.
Run visual QA comparing original and upgraded variants.
Do not apply all upgrades globally; apply by tag, biome, asset category, and material slot.
